mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_workflow_task WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date ASC

SELECT t.*, i.workflow_code AS workflowCode, i.form_data_id AS formDataId FROM rp_workflow_task t INNER JOIN rp_workflow_instance i ON t.instance_id = i.id WHERE t.assignee = #{assignee} AND t.status = 'pending' AND t.flag = '启用' ORDER BY t.create_date DESC

SELECT t.*, i.workflow_code AS workflowCode, i.form_data_id AS formDataId FROM rp_workflow_task t LEFT JOIN rp_workflow_instance i ON t.instance_id = i.id WHERE t.flag = '启用' ORDER BY t.create_date DESC
SELECT t.*, i.workflow_code AS workflowCode, i.form_data_id AS formDataId FROM rp_workflow_task t LEFT JOIN rp_workflow_instance i ON t.instance_id = i.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_workflow_task (id, instance_id, node_key, node_name, assignee, status, action, comment, completed_date, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{instanceId}, #{nodeKey}, #{nodeName}, #{assignee}, #{status}, #{action}, #{comment}, #{completedDate}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
